lint-sweep.description: Run linters, apply fixes, and summarize changes
lint-sweep.prompt:
Run the workflow tool named "lint-sweep".
No required params.
If arguments are provided, parse them into workflow parameters.
Arguments:
{{args}}

pr-review.description: Analyze a PR diff and generate a review
pr-review.prompt:
Run the workflow tool named "pr-review".
Required params: prNumber
If arguments are provided, parse them into workflow parameters.
Arguments:
{{args}}
